toolSelection.reason: Five traces show a stable false-negative routing pattern where answerable requests were treated as lacking a grounded capability or were sent down an over-broad initial path.

scoutDepth.reason: Scout-depth scores stayed nearly flat across the set, so the mean is not yet discriminative enough to target directly.

clarification.reason: Clarification did not materially activate in this batch; the perfect mean mostly reflects non-applicability rather than proven ambiguity handling.

planning.reason: Named-target resolution and planner-validation churn recur across multiple traces, including wrong-entity selection and repeated replan cycles.

execution.reason: This is the weakest dimension, driven by repeated repair loops that still end in wrong-entity answers, filtered-to-zero outputs, or partial completion.

synthesis.reason: When upstream grounding succeeds the final answers are usually coherent; remaining synthesis weakness is mostly inherited from earlier stages.

contextBudget.reason: A few traces were budget-heavy, but context spend was rarely the primary blocker.

reasoningDepth.reason: Reasoning was generally adequate and lower scores mostly followed upstream targeting or repair failures.

mcpTransport.reason: One explicit exact-fetch timeout and several retry cycles without capability gain make transport quality partially blocked rather than cleanly optimizable in isolation.

codeSafety.reason: No major unsafe behavior surfaced; lower scores mainly reflect weak-path retries and overconfident empty-set conclusions.

synthesisBudget.reason: Answer budget was seldom the limiting factor in this batch.

interactionRisks.risk: When planning does not deterministically resolve the intended target and coverage clauses, execution tends to spend retries on the wrong branch and completeness cannot fully recover.
Early false-negative capability judgments and over-broad routing create ambiguous candidate sets that later planning cannot resolve cleanly.
Timeouts and retry-without-capability-gain can present as generic execution weakness unless transport and repair behavior are evaluated together.
